_comment_fixture_tags_doc: Fixture tag taxonomy and examples: docs/fixture-tag-examples.md
_comment_id: Format: '<org>/<bundle-name>'. Must be unique in the MSP registry.
_comment_version: SemVer. Patch: comment-only changes. Minor: new cases added. Major: cases removed/renamed — RESETS carousel counter.
description: <One sentence describing what skills/agents this bundle tests and what quality dimensions it covers.>
_comment_track: Hint for MSP. Authoritative value lives in the MSP registry. Options: none | candidate | stable | trusted
_comment_risk: Determines N (carousel run count) and audit depth. Options: low | medium | high
_comment_data: Data handling classification. Options: synthetic-only | no-pii | pii-reviewed
_comment_min_version: Minimum agentcarousel CLI version required to execute this bundle.
_comment_schema_hash: SHA-256 of the JSON Schema file used for validation. Computed by `agentcarousel bundle pack`.
_comment_fixtures: Each entry has a relative path and SHA-256. Computed by `agentcarousel bundle pack`.
_comment_mocks: Each mock file used by fixtures in this bundle.
_comment_owners: GitHub handles of fixture authors responsible for this bundle.
_comment_domain: Domain tag used for audit assignment matching. Examples: text-processing, code-analysis, web-search, data-extraction, customer-support
_comment_policy: MSP policy document version this bundle was written against. Obtain from https://agentcarousel.com/policy
_comment_aibom_refs: Optional. Array of AIBOM component purls or URIs that this bundle's results attest to. Links RBA evidence back to an AIBOM inventory document. Format: purl (pkg:...) or URI (https://...).
_comment_validity_scope: Optional. Declares how long this attestation is considered valid. type: until_model_update | until_aibom_change | until_date | single_shot. expires_at (ISO-8601) required only when type=until_date.
_comment_rba_determination_threshold: Optional. Pass rate (0.0–1.0) required for an overall RBA pass determination. If omitted, the MSP default (0.75) applies. Bundles covering high-impact AI under M-25-21 §5 SHOULD set this explicitly.
